annotationMethod: Manual pixel landmarks selected once at original resolution on the approved front reference; points mark visible anatomical extrema or pupil centers, never hair, brows, skin texture, lighting, or background.
uncertainty: Painted contours and perspective make each manually chosen surface landmark approximate; ratios are used only for the five named macro mismatches and require a material score margin, not a likeness claim.

contourBands.method: Candidate cheek and jaw anchors are full visible head-surface contour x extrema, excluding stable ear vertices, in narrow vertical bands normalized from the eye line to the chin point. The bands match the manual target points at y=573 and y=728.
